context: Tests whether the agent correctly orients at session start using graph_overview and search before taking action, and avoids over-documenting trivial session state.

checklist.name: graph_overview called first
checklist.description: Agent called graph_overview as the first graphthulhu action before doing anything else

checklist.name: Relevant search performed
checklist.description: Agent called search with keywords relevant to the task (e.g. 'caching', 'Redis', 'API') to surface prior context

checklist.name: Findings summarised
checklist.description: Agent reported a concise summary of what was found in the knowledge graph (or confirmed nothing relevant exists) before proceeding

checklist.name: No trivial documentation
checklist.description: Agent did not create a page or block to document trivial session state (e.g. 'session started', 'user wants to add caching')
